text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hey, I'm back! I gave it my all out there!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But I still feel like it wasn't enough... I wanted to
be like...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: You know, one last time at the end! Nnngh!
choice_data_list: But that was still a fantastic race.
You can do that next time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her she did great, and that her training really
paid off.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Trainer! I'd better keep it up, then!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Right! I'll try even harder, get even stronger, and
become even bigger!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Next time, I'm going to run a buono race that doesn't leave me with any regrets!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Let's train when we get back! I'm going to tackle practice head-on!
choice_data_list: Sure, but only if you mean it metaphorically!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh. Ehehe... Of course I do!
